channel.title: bothSidesHeadlinesNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from bothSidesHeadlinesNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Head-On Bus Collision Near Pentagon Stop Leaves 23 Injured
item.description: Two buses collided head-on near a Pentagon bus stop, injuring 23 people, including several employees of the Department of Defense.

item.title: VCU Approves Funding for Memorial Honoring Remains Taken Without Consent
item.description: Virginia Commonwealth University has approved funding to memorialize dozens of individuals, most of African descent, whose remains were removed from graves for anatomical study.

item.title: Virginia-Based US Army Major Charged with Aiding Cameroon Separatist Fighters
item.description: A US Army major working as a nurse at a Washington-area military installation has been charged with allegedly conspiring to provide financial and tactical support to armed separatists in Cameroon.

item.title: New York Sues Over Federal Threat to Withhold $74 Million in Highway Funds
item.description: New York filed a lawsuit challenging the federal Transportation Department's decision to withhold nearly $74 million in highway funding over the state's policy on immigrant commercial driver's licenses.

item.title: DOJ Adds Firing Squad as Permitted Execution Method Under Capital Punishment Push
item.description: The Justice Department has authorized the firing squad as an approved method of execution as the Trump administration moves to expand and accelerate the use of capital punishment.
